scope.target: DIST-001 componentized distribution and target provenance schema
constraints: Preserve one release identity with explicit component, profile, and provider selection
Default repo-backlog off for clean installs and preserve recorded existing selections
Migrate provenance authority to .dev/ai-context/provenance.yaml without dual authority
Keep source-only release operations out of downstream payload
non_goals: Delete target-owned backlog or workflow data

steps: Update package profile and metadata generation
Migrate target provenance template and readers
Validate deterministic package output and upgrade planning
validation: focused package schema and apply tests
execution.last_completed_step: Implemented and tested effective provider selection, v0.5 repo-backlog preservation, provider-aware workflow validation, receipt reconciliation evidence, and source-only release projection
execution.next_action: Completed; continue with the separately governed v0.6.0 release-engineering workstream

results.summary: The target provenance authority and distribution metadata now share one component/profile/provider selection shape. Clean installs default repo-backlog off, explicit clean-install enablement is supported, v0.5 schema-1 inventories preserve recorded backlog, component-aware upgrades require target provenance, and plans and receipts retain selection authority and per-component operation evidence.
tests_run: 18 AI context version governance tests passed
19 package apply tests passed with 1 platform-permission skip
20 full package and historical upgrade tests passed with 1 retained-downstream integration skip
quick gate passed 33 of 33 required checks; 2 contract-defined checks were not applicable
git diff --check passed with expected CFG-001 line-ending warnings
24 package apply tests passed with 1 Windows symlink skip
4 optional backlog provider workflow tests passed
source-only release renderer projection test passed
workflow artifact validation passed for 35 workflows, 55 indexed workflow directories, and 35 backlog items
full 21-test packaging matrix initially exposed one stale schema-2 fixture without required target provenance; the corrected focused upgrade case passed
final immutable-HEAD packaging matrix passed 24 tests with 1 retained-downstream environment skip
independent transient auditor verification confirmed the real component boundary and fail-closed override contract
results.residual_risk: The retained real-downstream integration fixture remains release-candidate evidence and was skipped because AI_CONTEXT_DOWNSTREAM_REPO was not supplied.
